Privacy Policy

We collect the information you provide when you create an account, as well as device identifiers and approximate location to operate our service.

How We Share

We share data with our service providers to operate the platform. Service providers are bound by contract. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration.

Retention

We retain personal information only as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations.

Your Choices

You have the right to access and the right to deletion of your personal information. You can opt-out of marketing emails at any time. To submit a data subject access request (DSAR), contact privacy@example.com.

Children Under 13

Our services are not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. This complies with COPPA.

California Residents

California residents may submit a "Do Not Sell My Personal Information" request. The California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) provides additional rights.

Cookies

We use cookies for authentication, analytics, and personalization. You can adjust your cookie preferences in our cookie settings. Some third-party advertising pixels are loaded with your consent.
